title: Price predictions 5/22: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
summary: Bitcoin sold off to $76,000, giving bears an opportunity to reclaim control of the crypto market. Meanwhile, altcoins like HYPE charted new highs.

title: US House lawmakers launch probe into Kalshi, Polymarket insider trading
summary: Representative James Comer asked CEOs of two major prediction market companies for information on their responses to insider trading after “suspiciously timed trades” related to US military actions against Iran.

title: Grocery Stores Feel Crunch of Fuel, Labor Costs Ahead of Memorial Day
summary: Stew Leonard Jr., president and CEO of Stew Leonard's, said that customers are still buying food ahead of Memorial Day celebrations, but they're also complaining about the squeeze they feel when they go to the store. title: Emerging Assets Post Positive Week as Hopes for Peace Deal Grow
summary: Emerging-market stocks and currencies gained on the week as investors grew increasingly hopeful that the US and Iran are moving closer to a peace deal.

title: New strategic bitcoin reserve bill drops 1 million BTC purchase target, adds 20-year lockup period
summary: The bill would require quarterly public proof-of-reserve disclosures and third-party audits of government bitcoin holdings.
